summary: Add google-generativeai (or Vertex AI) client dependency and wire auth config for text-embedding-005

resolution.note: README pip line extended with google-generativeai (+ numpy, needed by migrate_to_sqlite_embeddings.py and the forthcoming embed_corpus.py rewrite); GEMINI_API_KEY documented. config/embedding.toml now declares google/text-embedding-005/768d as a commented option on the existing provider axis — no runtime behavior change yet.
